Q: How do I reset my password?
A: Go to Settings > Account > Reset Password. Enter your current password and then set a new one. You'll receive a confirmation email once the change is complete.

Q: How do I cancel my subscription?
A: Navigate to Settings > Billing > Manage Subscription and click 'Cancel Subscription'. Your access will continue until the end of the current billing period.

Q: What payment methods do you accept?
A: We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, PayPal, and bank transfers for annual plans.

Q: How do I upgrade my plan?
A: Go to Settings > Billing > Change Plan. Select your desired plan and confirm. The price difference will be prorated for the remainder of your billing cycle.

Q: Can I get a refund?
A: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for new subscriptions. Contact support@example.com within 14 days of purchase to request a full refund.

Q: How do I add team members?
A: Navigate to Settings > Team > Invite Members. Enter their email addresses and assign roles (Admin, Editor, or Viewer). They'll receive an invitation email.

Q: What are the different user roles?
A: Admin: full access and billing. Editor: can create and modify content. Viewer: read-only access to dashboards and reports.

Q: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
A: Go to Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. Choose between authenticator app or SMS verification and follow the setup wizard.

Q: How do I export my data?
A: Navigate to Settings > Data > Export. Choose the format (CSV, JSON, or PDF) and the date range. The export file will be emailed to you within 15 minutes.

Q: What is the API rate limit?
A: Free plan: 100 requests per hour. Pro plan: 1,000 requests per hour. Enterprise plan: 10,000 requests per hour. Rate limit headers are included in every API response.

Q: How do I generate an API key?
A: Go to Settings > Developer > API Keys and click 'Generate New Key'. Store the key securely as it will only be displayed once.

Q: How do I contact support?
A: You can reach us via email at support@example.com, through the in-app chat widget, or by phone at +1-800-555-0199 during business hours (9 AM–6 PM EST).

Q: What browsers are supported?
A: We support the latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. Internet Explorer is not supported.

Q: Is there a mobile app?
A: Yes, our mobile app is available for iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play). It supports all core features including dashboards, notifications, and team collaboration.

Q: How do I set up notifications?
A: Go to Settings > Notifications. You can configure email, in-app, and push notification preferences for different event types like billing alerts, team updates, and system status.

Q: Can I use a custom domain?
A: Custom domains are available on Pro and Enterprise plans. Go to Settings > Branding > Custom Domain and follow the DNS configuration instructions.

Q: How do I integrate with Slack?
A: Navigate to Settings > Integrations > Slack. Click 'Connect' and authorize the app in your Slack workspace. You can then configure which channels receive notifications.

Q: What is the uptime guarantee?
A: We guarantee 99.9% uptime for Pro and Enterprise plans. Our status page at status.example.com provides real-time system health information.

Q: How do I delete my account?
A: Go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. This action is permanent and will remove all your data after a 30-day grace period. Download your data export before proceeding.

Q: How do I change my email address?
A: Navigate to Settings > Account > Email. Enter your new email address and verify it through the confirmation link sent to the new address.

Q: What is included in the free plan?
A: The free plan includes 1 user, 3 projects, 100 API calls per hour, 1 GB storage, and community support. No credit card required to start.

Q: How do I create a new project?
A: Click the '+ New Project' button on the dashboard. Enter a project name, description, and select a template if desired. You can invite team members immediately after creation.

Q: Can I transfer project ownership?
A: Yes, go to Project Settings > General > Transfer Ownership. Enter the email of the new owner (must be an existing team member with Admin role).

Q: How do I set up webhooks?
A: Navigate to Settings > Developer > Webhooks. Add a new webhook URL, select the events you want to subscribe to, and optionally add a signing secret for verification.

Q: What data formats are supported for import?
A: We support CSV, JSON, XML, and Excel (.xlsx) formats for data import. Maximum file size is 50 MB. For larger imports, use our API bulk upload endpoint.

Q: How does the search feature work?
A: Our search uses hybrid retrieval combining semantic search (for meaning) and keyword search (for exact matches). Results are ranked by relevance with confidence scores.

Q: How do I view my billing history?
A: Go to Settings > Billing > Invoice History. You can view, download, and print invoices for all past transactions.

Q: Is my data encrypted?
A: Yes, all data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3. We also support customer-managed encryption keys on Enterprise plans.

Q: How do I reset my API key?
A: Go to Settings > Developer > API Keys. Click the 'Regenerate' button next to your existing key. The old key will be immediately invalidated.

Q: Can I white-label the platform?
A: White-labeling is available on Enterprise plans. This includes custom domain, logo, color scheme, and email branding. Contact sales@example.com for details.

Q: How do I configure SSO?
A: SSO is available on Enterprise plans. Go to Settings > Security > Single Sign-On. We support SAML 2.0 and OpenID Connect protocols.

Q: What is the maximum file upload size?
A: Free plan: 10 MB per file. Pro plan: 100 MB per file. Enterprise plan: 500 MB per file. Supported formats include PDF, DOCX, images, and spreadsheets.

Q: How do I archive a project?
A: Open the project, go to Project Settings > General > Archive Project. Archived projects are read-only and don't count toward your project limit.

Q: Can I schedule reports?
A: Yes, go to Reports > Schedule. Choose the report type, frequency (daily, weekly, monthly), recipients, and preferred format (PDF or CSV).

Q: How do I manage user permissions?
A: Navigate to Settings > Team > Permissions. You can set granular permissions per project or use role-based presets (Admin, Editor, Viewer).

Q: What happens when my trial expires?
A: When your 14-day trial expires, your account will be downgraded to the Free plan. All data is preserved, but premium features will be locked until you upgrade.

Q: How do I enable audit logs?
A: Audit logs are available on Pro and Enterprise plans. Go to Settings > Security > Audit Log to view all user activity including logins, changes, and API calls.

Q: Can I use the API without an account?
A: No, API access requires authentication. You must sign up for an account and generate an API key. All API endpoints require a valid Bearer token.

Q: How do I change my timezone?
A: Go to Settings > Account > Preferences > Timezone. Select your timezone from the dropdown. This affects all date and time displays across the platform.

Q: What integrations are available?
A: We integrate with Slack, Microsoft Teams, Jira, GitHub, Zapier, Google Workspace, and Salesforce. Visit Settings > Integrations to see all available options.

Q: How do I share a dashboard?
A: Open the dashboard and click the 'Share' button. You can share with team members, create a public link (read-only), or embed it in external sites using an iframe.

Q: What is the data retention policy?
A: Active accounts: data retained indefinitely. Deleted accounts: data removed after 30-day grace period. We comply with GDPR and offer data processing agreements on request.

Q: How do I troubleshoot login issues?
A: Try clearing your browser cache and cookies. Ensure you're using a supported browser. If using SSO, verify with your IT admin. Contact support if the issue persists.

Q: Can I import data from another platform?
A: Yes, we support migration from major platforms. Go to Settings > Data > Import and select your source platform. Our migration wizard will guide you through the process.

Q: How do I set up email forwarding?
A: Go to Settings > Integrations > Email. Add your support email address and configure forwarding rules. Incoming emails will automatically create tickets in your dashboard.

Q: What are usage analytics?
A: Usage analytics show your API call volume, storage usage, active users, and feature adoption. Access them from the Dashboard > Analytics tab.

Q: How do I request a new feature?
A: Visit our feedback portal at feedback.example.com to submit and vote on feature requests. Our product team reviews submissions monthly.

Q: Is there a service level agreement?
A: SLAs are available on Enterprise plans. They include guaranteed response times (1 hour for critical issues), 99.9% uptime, and a dedicated account manager.

Q: How do I update my billing information?
A: Go to Settings > Billing > Payment Methods. You can add, update, or remove credit cards and PayPal accounts. Changes take effect immediately.

Q: What compliance certifications do you have?
A: We are SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant, and HIPAA compliant (Enterprise plan). Certification documents are available upon request at compliance@example.com.
